mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.avatar, u.phonenumber, u.password, u.sex, u.status, u.del_flag, u.login_ip, u.login_date, u.create_by, u.create_time,u.area,u.career,u.age,u.remark, u.union_id, u.open_id, r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status as role_status from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id
mapper.select:
select distinct u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber, u.status, u.create_time from sys_user u left join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id left join sys_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where u.del_flag = '0' and (r.role_id != #{roleId} or r.role_id IS NULL) and u.user_id not in (select u.user_id from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role ur on u.user_id = ur.user_id and ur.role_id = #{roleId})
AND u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{phonenumber}, '%')
${params.dataScope}
select user_id, user_name from sys_user where user_name = #{userName} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, phonenumber from sys_user where phonenumber = #{phonenumber} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select user_id, email from sys_user where email = #{email} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
SELECT CASE WHEN age BETWEEN 18 AND 45 THEN '青年' WHEN age BETWEEN 46 AND 69 THEN '中年' WHEN age >= 70 THEN '老年' ELSE '其他' END AS age_group, COUNT(*) AS `count` FROM sys_user GROUP BY age_group;
SELECT sex, COUNT(*) as `count` FROM sys_user GROUP BY sex
SELECT area, COUNT(*) as `count` FROM sys_user GROUP BY area
SELECT career, COUNT(*) as `count` FROM sys_user GROUP BY career
SELECT age FROM sys_user where del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user( user_id, user_name, nick_name, email, avatar, phonenumber, sex, password, status, create_by, remark, area, career, age, open_id, union_id, create_time )values( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{phonenumber}, #{sex}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, #{area}, #{career}, #{age}, #{openId}, #{unionId}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update sys_user set status = #{status} where user_id = #{userId}
update sys_user set avatar = #{avatar} where user_name = #{userName}
update sys_user set password = #{password} where user_name = #{userName}
mapper.delete: update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id = #{userId}

update sys_user set del_flag = '2' where user_id in
#{userId}
